name: Minced Pork Balls on Skewers
recipeIngredient: 3 Dried Japanese black mushrooms, soaked in cold water for 1/2 hr
2 tsp Mirin or slightly sweet white wine
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
1. Combine 1 cup Sake/Mirin/slightly sweet white wine, 1/3 cup Dark soy sauce, 1 tbsp Sugar, 1/3 cup Soup stock, and a pinch of Chili powder in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat, then add the juice of one lemon.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before straining into small sauce bowls.
4. Form the meat mixture (see below) into 1 1/2 inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in breadcrumbs until lightly coated.
6. Heat oil for deep frying in a wok to about 350°F (175°C).
7. Fry the meatballs in batches, turning occasionally, until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Thread several meatballs onto each skewer.
10. Arrange the skewers on a serving dish lined with lettuce.
11. Serve with the sauce drizzled over the top.
